resources.string: Add your first card by tapping +
Prices may be outdated. Tap to refresh.
Type at least 2 characters to search
Try searching in another language\nor check the spelling
Point the camera at cards art
You don\'t have this card in your collection
This card is not in your wishlist
Remove this copy from your collection?
Remove this item from your wishlist?
Select copies to mark for trade
Choose which copies you want to mark for trade. They will remain in your collection.
You have no collection copies to mark for trade.
No personal tags — tap + to add
Confirm those that apply or discard them. They won\'t be added until you approve them.
Tags with confidence ≥ %1$d%% are added automatically. Between %2$d%% and %1$d%% they are suggested.
One rule per line. Combine required terms with \' + \'. Prefix a term with \'!\' to exclude. Example: gain + life + !gain control
Camera access needed to scan cards
Hold the art card inside the box
Hold card steady in good light
Camera permission denied. Open Settings to enable it.
Card database not loaded — scanner identification disabled
Auto-add detected cards using current mode settings
Show card info and price without adding to collection
A one-time download is required to enable card identification.
Play sound when a card is detected
Place card name in the zone
Add cards to see your stats
Associate games with decks via the post-game survey to see deck stats here
Recorded game sessions will appear here
Delete this game? It will also remove the linked survey.
No game data for this deck yet
Create your first deck with the help of our builder
Add cards that could help in specific matchups
Tap a card\'s art to use it as the deck cover
Cards that could help against specific matchups
I confirm this card allows more copies
You have unsaved changes. Discard them and leave?
Possibly invalid commander: Must be Legendary
Invalid color identity for this commander
Excellent mana curve. You have a balanced spread of costs.
Mana curve is too high. You might struggle in the early game.
Mana curve is very low. You might run out of steam in the late game.
Solid land count for this format.
Too few lands. You might get mana screwed often.
Too many lands. You might get mana flooded often.
Great amount of interaction and removal.
Low on interaction. Consider adding more removal or counterspells.
Deck lacks clear synergies. Try focusing on specific tags or strategies.
No health data available for this deck.
Mana curve of non-land cards by mana value
Mana curve is too high (avg %1$s). You may stumble early.
Mana curve is very low (avg %1$s). You may run out of gas.
Low synergy density (%1$d%%). Cards do not pull in one direction.
Ranked by lowest fit. Commander and combo cores are protected.
Ranked by best fit, from your collection.
No cut candidates — this deck looks tight.
Add more cards to your collection to get suggestions that fit this deck.
Couldn\'t reach Scryfall — showing collection and wishlist suggestions only.
All suggestions are already in your collection — free to add.
Search a card to seed your deck…
Search for a card above and add it to seed your deck.
Tap a player to change position
Create a room and share the code
Show land-played indicator on active player
Say a phrase to mark your land as played
Say a phrase to advance to the next turn
No phrases available for the selected languages.
All life totals and counters will reset.
Select a template or adjust rotations
Tap two players to swap their positions
Game paused. Resume from the Play button.
A player was eliminated by poison counters
Anything you\'d do differently next time?
Commander damage was decisive.\nWas that your plan?
What would have changed the outcome?
Did you swap any sideboard cards?
Anything to note about this game?
Did any card make a difference?
Associate this game with one of your decks
No deck associated — card impact tracking unavailable
Are you on the play or the draw?
Commander is set aside in the Command Zone. Library: 99 cards.
Keep → put %1$d card(s) on the bottom
What is missing from the hand?
Playtest session data was lost (process was killed). Please go back and start a new session.
Paired by similar record each round
You choose the order of matches
Play your first game to unlock stats
Developed with ❤️ for the MTG community
You end games fast and hit hard
You outlast opponents and win late
The multiplayer battlefield is your home
Flexible and adaptable in any game
Win a game with more than 30 life
Eliminate a player with poison counters
Eliminate a player with commander damage
Own a card worth more than %1$s
Win a game in less than 8 turns
Win a game that lasts more than 20 turns
Win a game from 5 or less life
Play a game lasting 90 minutes or more
Play a game with 4 or more players
Open the app 3 / 7 / 30 days in a row
Win a game with exactly 1 life remaining
Own 20+ cards in every one of the five colors
Update prices when opening the app
Edit translations, detection patterns and auto-tagger thresholds.
Let friends see your card collection
Let friends see your trade offers
Could not update privacy settings. Please try again.
Microphone audio is processed on-device only. No audio is recorded or transmitted.
Receive alerts about trades and friends
Accepted, declined, edited or completed trades
Open the system notification settings for ManaHub
Enable notifications to receive trade and friend updates
Show XP, levels, achievements and quests
No cards found for this search
Could not reach Scryfall. Try again.
No news yet. Pull down to refresh.
Feed URL or YouTube channel ID
Enable, disable, or add custom feeds
At least one news language must be selected
The app language will change. This may require a restart.
Guide not available for this set yet
Tier list not available for this set yet
Based on AI analysis, approximate values
No videos found for this set
Showing cached data. Pull to refresh.
This set is not available for simulation yet.
No connection and no cached data.
Something went wrong with the draft.
Paste a deck list in Moxfield or MTG Arena format. Each line should follow the pattern: 4 Lightning Bolt or 4 Lightning Bolt (M11) 163

Deck
4 Lightning Bolt
2 Mountain

Sideboard
2 Grafdigger's Cage
Please write a message before sending.
Invalid file. Please select a JPG, PNG, or WebP image under 10 MB.
Create a free account to unlock cloud features
Save and access your decks anywhere
More features coming soon, including the web version
You can use the app without an account
Enter your email to receive a reset link
Reset link sent! Check your inbox
Are you sure? This action cannot be undone. All your synced data will be permanently deleted.
Check your inbox to confirm your email!
An unexpected error occurred. Try again
This email is already registered with a password. Sign in with email and password instead.
Your Google account (%1$s) matches an existing ManaHub account. Enter your password to enable Google Sign-In for this account.
No account found for this Google account. Please create an account first.
Password must be at least 8 characters
Password must include uppercase, lowercase, a number and a symbol
This nickname contains inappropriate content. Please choose another.
Nickname must be 30 characters or less.
Nickname can only contain letters, numbers, spaces and basic punctuation.
We sent a confirmation link to %1$s.\nTap it to activate your account.
You need to be logged in to manage your friends.
No player found with that game tag.
No friends yet. Search by game tag to add someone!
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Could not send friend request. Please try again.
Could not cancel invitation. Please try again.
%1$s\'s collection is empty or not public
%1$s\'s wishlist is empty or not public
%1$s\'s trade list is empty or not public
Could not load cards. Check your connection.
Coming soon — multiplayer games will be tracked when online sessions launch.
No online games played with %1$s yet.
Could not load match history. Check your connection.
Could not load stats. Tap to retry.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s from your friends?
Could not remove friend. Please try again.
Add friends to see their trade lists
You have no friends yet. Add friends to start trading.
Sign in to track your trades
This user no longer shares publicly
Synced %d cards from this device to your account.
Proposals with \'Review my collection\' cannot be accepted directly — only declined or countered.
Waiting for the other party to confirm
This negotiation has gone on for a while. Consider declining to start fresh.
One or more cards are already committed in another accepted trade: %s. Decline this proposal or wait for the other trade to resolve.
The inventory state has changed unexpectedly. Please contact support.
Completed, cancelled, and declined proposals will appear here.
Build your wishlist, list cards you\'re open to trade, and discover smart matches with friends. Sign in to get started.
Tap to choose who you\'re trading with
Add cards you want to trade away
Search for cards you want from them
Let them browse your collection for more cards
No proposals in this thread yet.
The proposal will be cancelled and the other player will be notified. This cannot be undone.
%d card(s) are already locked in another accepted trade. Please wait for that trade to resolve or revoke it.
The proposal was modified by the other party. Please refresh and review the latest version.
One or more cards could not be moved. The inventory may have changed since the trade was accepted.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

You are about to receive %1$d card(s) not registered in any collection:

%2$s

Would you like to add them to your collection?
These cards will be removed from your collection
These cards will be added to your collection
No cards will be moved in this trade
This will revoke the accepted trade. The other user will be notified.

This will revoke the trade. Since you already updated your collection with this trade\'s cards, would you like to reverse those changes? Your previously sent cards will be restored and received cards removed.
The other party hasn\'t added any specific cards — only \'Review my collection\'. Accepting means you\'ll be giving your cards without a guaranteed return. Continue?
Add another copy with different options
Waiting for everyone to be ready…
Share this code with the other players
Waiting for the host to start
Too many failed attempts. Wait 5 minutes.
You already have an active room. Close it before creating another.
Room not found or already started.
You already have an active room
Add widgets to personalize your home screen.
Tap the pencil to customize your dashboard
Your layout will be reset to the default. This cannot be undone.
Play games to see your win rate.
Add cards to see your colors.
Build a deck to get started.
Back up your collection so it\'s safe across devices.
Sync your decks to keep them on every device.
Keep your match history across devices.
Start building your collection by adding a card to your library.
Use your camera to instantly identify and add cards to your collection.
Back up your collection, track stats, and connect with other players.
Create a deck from the cards in your collection and start playing.
Try out your deck in a test session to see how it performs before your next game.
Connect with other players to trade cards and track game history together.
See what decks your friends are playing and what cards they have for trade.
Start a game session and let ManaHub track your life totals, turns, and outcomes.
See your win rate, best deck, and play history at a glance.
Learn card ratings and pick strategies for the latest MTG sets.
Stay up to date with MTG spoilers, set releases, and community highlights.
Propose a trade with a friend to swap cards from your collections.
Save the cards you want so you never forget what you\'re looking for.
Let friends know which cards in your collection you\'re willing to trade away.
Set your preferred theme, currency, and app language in Settings.
Add an avatar and a player name so others can recognize you in trade and game history.
Leave a review on the store to help other players discover the app.
Hidden achievement — keep playing to reveal it.
Play games, build decks and grow your collection to start unlocking achievements.
Achievement unlocked: %1$s, tier %2$d, plus %3$d XP. Tap to continue.
Run a deck through Deck Doctor.
Play today to start a streak
Freezes protect your streak on days you can\'t play.
Couldn\'t claim that quest. Try again.
Daily and weekly quests appear here. Check back soon for new challenges.
Level, XP, streak and daily quests
Your active quests at a glance
You have completed quests waiting for their reward.
Add 20 cards to your collection this week.
Play a game with 4 or more players this week.
Level up. You reached level %1$d. Tap to dismiss.
Earn cosmetics by leveling up and unlocking achievements.
You can equip up to %1$d badges. Unequip one first.
